login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your CalDAV and CardDAV resources.
login.register_disabled: Public sign-up is disabled by administrators.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Your default calendar and address book are generated automatically.
register.name: Name
register.pending_approval_notice: Registration submitted. An administrator must approve your account before you can sign in.
register.pending_verification_notice: Registration submitted. Verify your email address before signing in.

two_factor.title: Two-Factor Verification
two_factor.subtitle: Enter your 6-digit authenticator code or a backup code.

verify_email.title: Verify Email
verify_email.subtitle: One moment while we confirm your email address.
verify_email.success: Email verified. You can now sign in to continue.
verify_email.error: Unable to verify this email link. Request a new one.

invite.title: Activate Account
invite.subtitle: Set a password to complete your invitation.
